name: tachyon-companion
description: Tachyon Companion — external shells (browser + mobile) that pair with the Tachyon engine

scripts.build: npm run build -w @tachyon-companion/protocol && npm run build -w @tachyon-companion/api-client && npm run build -w @tachyon-companion/browser
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @tachyon-companion/protocol && npm run typecheck -w @tachyon-companion/protocol && npm run typecheck -w @tachyon-companion/api-client && npm run typecheck -w @tachyon-companion/browser
